sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n31295" key="ei)sauga/zw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">εἰσαυγάζω</orth>, <sense id="n31295.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">look at, view,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">AP</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">5.105</biblScope> </bibl> (<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Diotim.</author> </bibl>).</sense> </entryFree>
